noise_description: Each cell updates independently with probability α at each time step; non-updated cells retain their previous state.

boundary_cases.alpha=0: No cells update; system is frozen.
boundary_cases.alpha=1: All cells update synchronously; equivalent to standard deterministic ECA.

mcq.description: Multiple-choice with 4 options (A/B/C/D), exactly one correct answer. Scored binary: 1 correct, 0 otherwise.

short_answer.description: Free-form response (numerical value, formula, derivation, or brief explanation). Scored 0/1/2 by judge model (Grok-3) and normalised to [0,1] by dividing by 2.

Easy.description: Definitional recall and basic comprehension; answerable directly from the noise model definition.

Medium.description: Understanding of mechanics and properties; requires knowing implications, not just definitions.

Hard.description: Quantitative reasoning, derivation, or cross-model comparison; requires multi-step reasoning.

scoring.short_answer: Three-point rubric by independent judge (Grok-3): 2=fully correct, 1=partially correct, 0=incorrect or missing. Normalised to [0,1] by dividing by 2.
scoring.overall_accuracy: Mean of all normalised scores across both question types.

purpose: Knowledge-check dataset. Confirms that LLM failures on the identification task reflect structural inability to read spatiotemporal patterns, not gaps in domain knowledge. A model with strong domain knowledge should achieve near-perfect accuracy. No question requires solving the inverse problem.

pdf_discrepancies.note: Table 4 in the PDF reports different format/difficulty counts from the actual JSON data. JSON (actual data) is authoritative.
